content.en:
"It's finally here!"

Ye Tian took this primordial divine weapon bell and prepared to refine it.

This Primordial Divine Weapon is a bit special, not only is it the top-notch Primordial Divine Weapon, but also the origin is very stubborn, and it is engraved with the inheritance of the Primordial Zhou Tiantu, which makes this Primordial Divine Weapon difficult to refine.

At the beginning, it was not that the Abyss Palace Master didn't want to refine it, but that he couldn't refine it.

However, Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the peak realm of the Triple Origin Ancestor, and he had comprehended more than a hundred black characters, and it was only a matter of time before he wanted to refine this big bell.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian manipulated more than a hundred extreme poles to infiltrate into the inside of this big bell and slowly began to refine it.

Time passed slowly, and this primordial divine weapon was gradually refined by Ye Tian.

Thirteen years after the Origin Domain Era, Ye Tian was completely refined.

"Creation Heavenly Clock!"

This is the name of this large bell, if it is used as a weapon, its defense is very strong, and the more extreme it is integrated, its defense will continue to improve.

Of course.

It was impossible for Ye Tian to use it as a weapon to resist the enemy's attacks, otherwise wouldn't this inheritance of the Primordial Zhou Tian Diagram be exposed.

Until he fully comprehends this Primordial Zhou Tian Diagram, he will not destroy the inheritance on it.

Of course.

He could also transfer the inheritance, but in that case, most of the Heavenly Bell would be wasted.

"The next goal is to comprehend the one hundred and eight extreme extremes and black characters, and then engrave the black characters on the Pagoda of Will!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Once he does this, his strength can skyrocket!

Due to the exhaustion of resources, Ye Tian's next comprehension speed was a little slower, but the speed at which he comprehended an extreme extreme path was already a pervert that other Triple Origin Ancestors couldn't imagine!

"Let's practice slowly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

There is no empty heavenly gate.

this day.

A group of Quadruple Ancestors were discussing a matter, and their faces were very solemn at this moment.

"Something happened to Sunset Mountain, you know?"

The one who spoke was the Bitter Sea Ancestor of the Fourfold Origin Ancestor of the Voidless Heavenly Gate, a powerhouse who had successfully stepped into the Fourfold Origin Ancestor with the thirty-six extreme extremes and the systematic inscription technique of the Voidless True Body Technique.

Once, he entered the Void Tooth Holy Gate to practice, but later returned to the Voidless Heavenly Gate as one of the deputy sect masters.

It can be said that the Bitter Sea Ancestor is definitely among the top among the four ancestors.

"Bitter Sea Ancestor, I waited until I knew, Sunset Mountain was ransacked, and tens of thousands of Triple Origin Seeds were killed, although they were all will clones, but this batch of Triple Origin Ancestors could no longer send will clones to Sunset Mountain to guard in a short period of time, and they needed to re-dispatch Triple Ancestors. "

"It's a pity that Sunset Mountain can't accommodate the Quadruple Ancestor, otherwise I will wait for any one of them to guard there, and there will be no accident!"

"It's useless to say this, during this period of time, the Sunset Orb will be born at any time in Sunset Mountain, you should all know the value of the Sunset Orb very well, it is one of the necessary materials for cultivating the Holy Art Nine Yang Sword Light. The purpose of that group of primordial black beasts is definitely the Sunset Orb, and at present, Sunset Mountain has been invaded by them, and they need to be invaded back, and they must be successfully stationed, otherwise they will take it away again, and the Sunset Orb is still at risk of being lost!"

"Although the primordial black beast has wisdom, it will not want to seize the sunset orb, it should be a certain force that controls a powerful primordial black beast, and then let that primordial black beast order countless primordial black beasts to attack. "

"What if you guess that there are forces to make a move, we can't find evidence!"

"Let's send the Triple Ancestor to Sunset Mountain first, that treasure land cannot be lost!"

"Well, let those top Triple Ancestors also go, don't always take advantage of nothing. "

"By the way, let the Endless Origin Ancestor also go, experience it, and he obtained so many resources last time, his cultivation has been promoted to the peak of the Triple Origin Ancestor, and he has mastered dozens of extreme extreme paths, and his strength is still very strong!"

"Then it's decided!"

......

There is no empty heavenly gate.

Ye Tian received a summons from the top.

"Go and recapture Sunset Mountain, and then guard Sunset Mountain!"

Ye Tian didn't know much about Sunset Mountain, so he went to find out, and then he knew the value of Sunset Mountain.

Sunset Mountain produces Sunset Orbs, and Sunset Orbs are one of the nine special treasures of the Nine Yang Sword Light, an attack-type holy art, that contain the Extreme Path of the Sun.

Once you have gathered the nine kinds of orbs and mastered the twenty-seven extreme extremes, you can practice the Nine Yang Sword Light.

The Jiuyang Sword Light attack was very terrifying, and there was once a Triple Origin Ancestor who relied on the Jiuyang Sword Light to kill a weaker Quadruple Ancestor with a single sword, so he was famous in the Spirit Origin Domain.

One can imagine how valuable the Sunset Orb is.

Moreover, the Void Tooth Holy Gate wants the Sunset Orb, and once the Void Heavenly Gate obtains the Sunset Orb, it needs to supply the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

Now, Sunset Mountain is lost, this is a big thing, and the Void Tooth Holy Gate will be furious when he knows it.

"Since it's the Heavenly Gate of the Void for me to go, let's go!"

Ye Tian decided.

However, this time, he was not going to send the will clone, but to copy the body and go in person, and the will clone stayed at the Voidless Heavenly Gate.

After all, a will doppelganger cannot copy a body, but a copy body can do it to copy other bodies.

Moreover, he plans to use the ability to copy the body, copy a primordial black beast, and blend into the opponent's camp, maybe he can discover some secrets and get some benefits!

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian went directly to the place where he gathered, and converged with the other Triple Origin Ancestors of the Voidless Sky, and under the leadership of the Fourfold Origin Ancestor, he left the Upper Spirit Origin Domain and headed for Sunset Mountain.

Sunset Mountain is not in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, Sunset Mountain is a special treasure land, and only the Triple Origin Ancestor is allowed to enter it.

Soon.

The Quadruple Ancestors led nearly 100,000 Triple Ancestors here, with the purpose of recapturing Sunset Mountain.

"Let's go inside!"

The Fourfold Ancestors commanded.

Buzz Buzz!!

One by one, the Triple Primordial Ancestors escaped into Sunset Mountain, but soon saw a dense network of primordial black beasts.

"Why are there so many primordial black beasts???"

The faces of the Triple Ancestors changed, this number is more than what the Quadruple Ancestors said!

Obviously, this Primordial Black Beast force has sent a large number of Primordial Black Beasts.

"Leave them alone, kill them!"

The Triple Primordial Ancestors fought with these Primordial Black Beasts.

And Ye Tian also made a move, but he didn't burst out all his combat power, only a small part of it, but it was still not comparable to the ordinary primordial black beast, even if it was a primordial black beast comparable to the powerful triple primordial ancestor, it couldn't stop Ye Tian's move.

"Ten Directions Sword Realm!"

One by one, the primordial black beasts were shrouded in the huge sword realm, and they were all bombarded into slag.

This is a primordial control technique created by Ye Tian with thirty-six extreme extreme paths, and its power is very terrifying, far exceeding the ordinary primordial control technique.

Ye Tian continued to slaughter a large number of primordial black beasts with the Ten Directions Sword Realm, and soon ushered in a primordial black beast with very terrifying combat power.
